text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Aaand please look right into the lens. Great,
thank you!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Okay, give me a moment to check the shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm accompanying Fine Motion on a photo
shoot to advertise a photography studio. The
theme of the shoot is "a wedding in the midst of
nature."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, we're going to take some pictures in
a forest next. Hehe, a woodland wedding sounds
so wonderful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
From the sounds of it, it's going to take some
time to set up. Why don't we go for a stroll in the
meantime?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, the air is so fresh! And the greenery is
beautiful—it reminds me of the forests back home
in Ireland!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if we keep walking, we'll stumble across a
fairy door that'll transport us there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Glimmer...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What's the matter, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Fine Motion about the strange lights I
glimpsed flickering near her. Maybe I'm just
seeing things...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Lights? I didn't see anything, though...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Hehe. It must be the fairies playing tricks
on you. ♪
choice_data_list: Fairies? Surely that's a little unlikely...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, who's to say? Look around. This forest is
simply wonderful! It wouldn't be too surprising if a
few fairies lived here, would it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Fairies love places with beautiful trees and clear,
flowing waters, you see. People tell lots of stories
about fairies in Ireland, you know.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Tales of fairies helping out with the housework at
night, or showing people the way to hidden gold.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But some fairies love to play pranks, and I've
heard that they even kidnap people! ♪
choice_data_list: I wouldn't want you to get kidnapped, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, don't you worry, Trainer. No fairy is going
to kidnap me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm rather good at negotiating, you know. So
even if I were to cross paths with a fairy...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I would extend them every courtesy and try to
request their assistance for the good of the Irish
public. ♪
choice_data_list: A fairy would make a great ally.
A fairy would make a great ally.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, if those lights you saw really were
fairies...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this next shoot will be quite wonderful
indeed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Ready when you are, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Splendid! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The forest photo shoot proceeds without a hitch.
Until...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Okay, now to look over the shots!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: W-wait, what's this?!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
It might be the exposure, but there's this radiant
glow surrounding Fine Motion...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Has the photo turned out wonderfully?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's absolutely magical! This picture... It's
practically a miracle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The photo shows Fine Motion bathed in a
shimmering glow, and the poster it's used for goes
on to garner quite a lot of attention!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
That expression—it's simply wonderful! Now, just
hold it for a moment... Hm? No, not now!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Why won't the shutter close?! I can't miss out on a
shot like this!
choice_data_list:
You don't think... a mischievous fairy could be
on the loose?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder. Well, I'm not sure, but shall I give
them a scolding just in case?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Messing people about is absolutely not allowed.
If you play one too many pranks, I might just
sprinkle some water on you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion addresses her surroundings with a
theatrical tone. And, perhaps thanks to her, there
are no more technical issues for the rest of the
shoot.
